title: Stalgis
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Stalgis |homeworld= |birth=c. [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Imperial Remnant]] **[[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|We should gather the other pilots from the downed fliers. We can't leave them out here to die in the cold."
"Why not? They seem to have no qualms about killing us.|Luke Skywalker and Stalgis discussing the Chiss attackers|''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''}} '''Stalgis''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], serving onboard the [[Widowmaker (frigate)|''Widowmaker'']]. He was born around [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], he accompanied [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], and [[Soron Hegerty]] on a scouting trip to [[Munlali Mafir]], and later on an a research trip to [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]], the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] capital. A stormtrooper named [[Tarl (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Tarl]] served under him, and was a close friend of his. Stalgis also had several close friends who perished during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Bastion|attack]] on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]], the Imperial capital. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Stalgis |es=Stalgis }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Officers of the Imperial Remnant]] [[Category:Stormtroopers of the Imperial Remnant]]
